name: claude-stack
description: EU-adapted Claude Code / Cowork plugins. German-market workflows grounded in real law via the dsgvo.pro MCP — not a translation of US plugins.

plugins.name: dsgvo
plugins.description: German digital-law compliance for websites: scan a site, review your Datenschutzerklärung, check cookie consent and Impressum, and classify AI systems under the AI Act — grounded in DSGVO, BDSG, TDDDG, DDG and KI-VO. Every legal citation is pulled live from the dsgvo.pro MCP — no hallucinated paragraphs.

plugins.name: kmu
plugins.description: Operator toolkit for a DSGVO-konform 'AI-Mitarbeiter' for the German Mittelstand: handle incoming/outgoing E-Rechnung and Mahnwesen (§286 BGB), and prepare clean Buchhaltung hand-off for the Steuerberater. Built for B2B-Dienstleister owners. Legal anchors cited from official sources (gesetze-im-internet.de, BMF); every client-facing output pauses for human approval.
